title: fix(pg): prevent duplicate database object warning

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: refactor(pg): remove pg-promise dependency and use pg.Pool directly

relatedIssues.title: Duplicate database object when using suspend/resume

summary: Adds a module-level connection cache with reference counting to prevent pg-promise 'duplicate database object' warnings when multiple PostgresStore instances share the same connection config (e.g., Next.js HMR, suspend/resume). Includes a test that verifies no duplicate warning is emitted.
maintainerNotes: This PR is fully superseded by #11450, which removed pg-promise entirely from @mastra/pg and replaced it with direct pg.Pool usage (merged 2025-12-29). The underlying issue #7534 is already closed. The PR has merge conflicts and the code it modifies no longer exists. Should be closed with a thank-you to the contributor for the well-written fix.
